# OUR FEATURED CATEGORIES
# Lab Solutions
At Medequip, we are dedicated to providing cutting-edge technology and comprehensive support to medical laboratories. We offer a wide range of diagnostic equipment designed to deliver precise and reliable results.
Read More
# Medical Furniture
We are dedicated to equipping medical facilities with premium furniture solutions designed to enhance efficiency, comfort, and safety. Our extensive range of medical furniture is crafted to meet the specific needs of hospitals, clinics, and laboratories.
Read More
# ICU & OR Equipment
We are committed to providing state-of-the-art equipment for Intensive Care Units (ICU) and Operating Rooms (OR). Our high-quality equipment is designed to support healthcare professionals in delivering exceptional patient care
Read More
# Dental Solutions
We specialize in providing comprehensive solutions for dental practices, ensuring you have the tools and equipment needed to deliver exceptional patient care. Our innovative products and dedicated support are designed to enhance the efficiency, safety,
Read More
# Dialysis Solutions
We are committed to providing innovative and reliable solutions for dialysis care. Our range of dialysis products and services is designed to enhance patient outcomes, improve operational efficiency, and support healthcare professionals
Read More
# Imaging Solutions
We are dedicated to providing cutting-edge imaging solutions that empower healthcare professionals to deliver accurate and efficient diagnostics. Our advanced imaging technology and comprehensive support ensure optimal performance

# About - Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd.
Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd was incorporated in 1993.   
The company's head office is located in the up market Hurligham area along Argwings Kodhek Road at Hass Biotechnology Centre in Nairobi - Kenya.
At Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd, we deal with the procurement and supply of medical equipments, reagents and consumables used in the clinical laboratory.   
Our core functions include marketing and delivery of supplies, service and maintenance of a vast range of laboratory equipments.
Our areas of speacialisation covers the field of; Microscopy, Chromatography, Haematology, Clinical Chemistry, Microbiology and Immuno Assay systems.
Read More
# Products We Offer - Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd.
At Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd., we deal with the procurement and supply of Medical Equipments, Reagents and Consumables used in the clinical laboratory.
##### CLINICAL CHEMISTRY ANALYSERS
Clinical chemistry analyzers use measurement technologies including photometric and colorimetric testing, ion-selective potentiometry, and latex agglutination to analyze samples such as blood serum, plasma, and urine.
##### MICROBIOLOGY ANALYSERS
Clinical microbiology is the discipline of detection, characterization, and quantification of microbes from patients in order to enable diagnosis, management and treatment of infectious diseases.
##### VIROLOGY - IMMUNOLOGY ANALYSERS
Diseases which can be detected using immunological techniques include allergy, immune deficiency, autoimmune diseases and a range of infectious diseases.
## What We Do - Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd.
At Hass Scientific & Medical Supplies (U) Ltd., we offer full maintainace of equipments on site by our fully trained engineers and application specialists by ensuring 24 Hour uptime.  
This includes; maintenance, spare parts, guaranteed response time and more to ensure maximum uptime and high quality results.
##### MACHINE INSTALLATION
Our local field specialists can install, commission and relocate your equipment.
##### TECHNICAL SUPPORT
We offer diagnostics and on-site service from our local experts.
##### SERVICE AND BACKUP
Quality Maintenance Service Back – up at its best, is our business.
# Do you have any question?
For any other questions relating to the activities of the company or any of our medical products, kindly contact us at any of the addresses below.
TALK TO OUR TEAM
